caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap and a red hooded sweatshirt speaks directly to the camera in an outdoor parking lot. He has a dark beard and is positioned in the foreground, with a blue car parked closely behind him. The background features a white building with a blue roof, several green trees, and utility poles under a bright, clear sky. As the sequence progresses, the man continues talking, his facial expressions shifting as he speaks, and his head tilts slightly. In the background, a small orange traffic cone becomes visible on the asphalt. The camera remains mostly stationary, capturing the man from the chest up, while the lighting and surrounding environment remain consistent throughout the clip.
